case.title: GENERAL BAKING CO. v. GOLDBLATT BROS.

opinion.h: GENERAL BAKING CO. v. GOLDBLATT BROS., 302 U.S. 732 (1937)
GENERAL BAKING COMPANY, petitioner, v. GOLDBLATT BROS., Inc.* No. 382.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Frederic P. Warfield, of New York City, for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 302 U.S. 778, 58 S. Ct. 262, 82 L.Ed. --.[ General Baking Co v. Goldblatt Bros. 302 U.S. 732 (1937) ]
